title: Off the Record
writer: Niven Busch, Lawrence Kimble, Earl Baldwin
actors: Pat O'Brien, Joan Blondell, Bobby Jordan
plot: Two newspaper reporters, Thomas "Breezy" Elliott and Jane Morgan, inadvertently send a boy named Mickey Fallon to reform school after they write an expose of the illegal slot-machine racket the boy was a spotter for. Guilt-ridden,...
